methodology: Only verified, publication-approved evidence may appear publicly. Merged upstream records are independently public evidence of acceptance, not proof of deployment, active use, or operational outcome.

entries.use_case: Contribute a threat-actor record update to the MISP Galaxy knowledge base.
entries.outcome: The upstream maintainers merged pull request 1227.
entries.limitations: Merge proves upstream acceptance of the contribution; it does not measure downstream deployments or operational use.

entries.product: Threat Matrix and CTI Analyst Field Manual
entries.use_case: Submit detection-engineering and CTI resources for upstream review.
entries.outcome: The upstream maintainers merged pull request 28.
entries.limitations: The merge is curation evidence, not a claim that the resources are deployed in a production SOC.

entries.use_case: Submit an AI-assisted malware-analysis and YARA-oriented tool for upstream review.
entries.outcome: The upstream maintainers merged pull request 78.
entries.limitations: The merge demonstrates external curation only; it does not establish package usage or active users.

entries.use_case: Submit the CTI-to-detection platform for upstream SOC-resource review.
entries.outcome: The upstream maintainers merged pull request 20.
entries.limitations: The merge is third-party curation evidence; it is not evidence of a production AdversaryGraph deployment.
